title: 120pcs Mini Safety Pins, 19mm Metal Small Safety Pins for Clothes, Sewing, DIY Crafts, Jewelry Making (Silver)
features: Premium Material:‌ Made of high-quality stainless steel, these safety pins are durable, rust-proof, and resistant to bending. The glossy finish ensures a bright appearance that won’t fade
Portable & Organized:‌ Includes 120pcs mini safety pins stored in a compact plastic box. Lightweight and easy to carry, perfect for on-the-go sewing or crafting needs
‌Wide Applications:‌ Ideal for clothing repairs, sewing projects, jewelry making, DIY crafts, and garment tags. These versatile pins save time and boost efficiency in daily tasks
User-Friendly Design:‌ Features a sharp needle tip for effortless fabric penetration without damage. The secure locking mechanism keeps the pin firmly closed, preventing accidental pricks
‌Complete Package:‌ You’ll receive 120pcs of silvery mini safety pins in one set, sufficient quantity for long-term use. Each pin is precisely sized for delicate and general purposes
